subject: fix(icons): improve SVG rendering with 400 DPI and geometricPrecision
body:
Sharp now rasterizes the SVG at 400 DPI (~5.5x the default 72 DPI
coordinate space) before downscaling to target sizes. Combined with
shape-rendering="geometricPrecision" on the SVG root element, this
produces noticeably crisper edges — especially on the 192px PWA icon.

CLAUDE.md updated with both techniques in the generator script example,
SVG design rules, and key lessons sections.

Tags: icons, svg, rendering, sharp
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
